title: Balyasny SWE Intern
summary: Built Python automation for pre-trade compliance workflows around short exposure, ownership data, and EOD trading headroom.

sections.heading: What I Worked On
items: pulled ownership, position, and holding data from internal databases for short-position review
built Python scripts to aggregate short exposure by holding threshold and flag accounts needing review
added real-time API checks for available trading headroom
generated Flask-based HTML reports for Compliance and EU Trading desks
automated email delivery of compliance outputs to replace spreadsheet-driven handoffs
reduced manual review time for European trading desks by roughly 15% by turning the review process into a repeatable data pipeline
